author: Superno7
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmedabout an hour agovia mobileReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Superno7 onabout an hour agoWe are all naturally hopeful that Iraola turns out to be a perfect fit for Liverpool and brings not only success in terms of winning trophies but also a style of play fans actually enjoy watching every week.What remains to be seen is what the club expects from Iraola, how much financial leeway he is given and ultimately how much of an upgrade is he on Arne Slot.The biggest challenge is maybe for Iraola himself in dealing with the pressures of a much bigger club than he has had previously.As much as it was absolutely the right call to end Slots time at the club, a dilemma for the owners has now been created in that does this now mean Iraola has to win a title within 2 years or is a top 5 finish good enough as long as the football is exciting to watch?
